name: trexo-roll
description: TREXoRoll — juego 3D de habilidad (inclina el tablero y rueda la bola al hoyo). Three.js, temática jurásica.

scripts.test: node tools/physics-smoke-test.mjs && node tools/level-validator.mjs && node tools/input-smoke.mjs && node tools/collectibles-smoke.mjs && node tools/imports-check.mjs && node tools/i18n-check.mjs && node tools/events-smoke.mjs && node tools/systems-smoke.mjs && node tools/auth-smoke.mjs
scripts.build:android: node tools/build-web.mjs && npx cap sync android

author: Stefano
